name: Bollinger Vortex Transition Breakout
edge_hypothesis: Bollinger Bands breakouts as a standalone strategy are dead (noisy, false breaks). BUT Vortex transition-detection is the #1 validated edge mechanism in the entire system (Vortex v3a PF=2.034 champion, 5 independent frameworks confirm transition-detection as general edge). This spec rehabilitates Bollinger breakout by GATING it with Vortex momentum confirmation. When close > BBU (price breaking upper band = volatility expansion / range breakout), the signal is only taken when VTXP > VTXM (positive Vortex = confirmed bullish transition). This filters out the false Bollinger breaks that killed the standalone template: a price spike above the upper band during a Vortex-negative regime is REJECTED. The mechanism: BBU breakout provides the WHERE (price exits its 20-period range), Vortex provides the WHEN (momentum is structurally positive). Expected edge in ranging-to-transitional regimes where Bollinger compression precedes Vortex transition — the dual confirmation catches the exact moment ranging ends and trending begins.

variants.name: bb_vortex_transition_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core variant. Bollinger upper break gated by Vortex positive momentum. 8:1 R:R sweet spot (proven across all promoted families). 1.5 ATR stop. Tests whether Vortex can rehabilitate the dead Bollinger breakout template.

components.notes: Bollinger upper band — breakout trigger identifying range exit.
Vortex positive — #1 validated transition-detection mechanism (PF=2.034 champion).

variants.name: bb_vortex_transition_v2_10to1
variants.description: Extended TP variant. 10:1 R:R (15x ATR TP). Bollinger breakouts into Vortex transitions may produce extended moves as the transition unfolds. Higher R:R captures more of the post-compression expansion. Tests whether Bollinger compression leads to larger moves than standard entries.

components.notes: Vortex positive momentum — extended TP for post-compression runs.
10:1 R:R for extended Bollinger expansion moves.

variants.name: bb_vortex_transition_v3_wide_8to1
variants.description: Wide stop variant. 2.0 ATR stop + 16x ATR TP (8:1 R:R maintained). Bollinger breakouts can retrace to the band before continuing — wider stop absorbs this retest without being stopped out. Tests stop sensitivity for breakout-style entries.

components.notes: Bollinger breakout with wider stop for band retest absorption.
Vortex gate — wider stop framework for breakout volatility.
2.0x stop / 16x TP — 8:1 R:R with room for retest.

advisory_context.novel_element: FIRST combination of Bollinger breakout (dead standalone) with Vortex transition-detection (#1 validated edge). Tests whether the #1 mechanism can rehabilitate a dead template.

indicator_roles.baseline: BBU_20_2.0 / BBL_20_2.0 — Bollinger Band breakout trigger
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework
